## Changelog

<!-- REQUIRED — automation reads this section to generate release notes.
     List every user-visible change as a bullet point using one of the prefixes below.
     Keep one change per line. Delete this comment when done.

     Prefixes:
       feat:     New feature or capability
       fix:      Bug fix
       perf:     Performance improvement
       refactor: Code restructuring with no behaviour change
       docs:     Documentation only
       chore:    Dependency updates, tooling, CI changes

     Example:
       - feat: add dark mode toggle to the header
       - fix: catalog upload modal no longer resets on validation error
       - chore: bump vitest to 4.1.0
-->

-

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (existing behaviour changes)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Dependency / tooling update

## Checklist

- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] No new TypeScript warnings (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Tests added or updated to cover this change
- [ ] All tests pass (`npm run test`)
- [ ] Documentation updated if behaviour changed
